overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a modern minimalist bedroom interior with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a hazy urban cityscape. The scene features a large bed with white linens and contemporary furnishings, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with atmospheric lighting and a cyberpunk-inspired aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the bedroom interior and urban landscape visible through the window

entered.detail: modern platform bed with white linens and pillows positioned centrally in the room
full-height glass windows spanning the wall behind the bed, offering city views
dense urban cityscape with multiple high-rise buildings visible through the hazy glass
tall palm tree visible outside the window against the urban backdrop
dark bedside table positioned to the right of the bed
round spherical decorative object or lamp sitting on the nightstand
illuminated wooden or textured wall panel on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: A static, atmospheric view of a contemporary high-rise bedroom featuring a large bed with crisp white linens against a backdrop of floor-to-ceiling windows. Through the hazy glass, a dense urban cityscape with towering buildings and a solitary palm tree is visible, suggesting a luxury apartment in a sprawling metropolitan area. The room is devoid of movement, with modern minimalist furnishings including a spherical lamp on the nightstand, creating a serene yet isolated ambiance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a luxury high-rise bedroom that emphasizes a sense of serene isolation against a sprawling urban backdrop. It begins with a focused view of a contemporary interior, highlighting a large bed with crisp white linens and minimalist furnishings like a spherical lamp on the nightstand. As the eye moves toward the perimeter of the room, the scene expands through floor-to-ceiling windows that frame a dense, hazy cityscape. The view finally settles on the towering buildings and a solitary palm tree visible through the glass, blending the quiet intimacy of the bedroom with the vast, metropolitan scale of the city outside.
